rows.label: tev012701_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask Fosdyke about the
White Whale's crew.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012701_MSG0001
rows.name:
The crew of the White Whale was composed
of various specialists thought capable of
enduring the rigors of space travel.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012701_MSG0003
rows.name:
At the moment I am merely a poet adrift
in this strange world. But as a star
sailor, my skills were second to none.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012701_MSG0004
rows.name:
Every resident of this city is a
master of some crucial skill—even
the ones who didn't join BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012701_MSG0005
rows.name:
They've all been assigned to the duty
that best suits their talents, and are
now working for the good of NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012701_MSG0006
rows.name:
Of course, not everyone was willing to play
their role. You can still find a few odd
drop-outs like myself if you know where to look.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012701_MSG0009
rows.name:
I take it you're a BLADE? I was
one myself, until recently.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012701_MSG0010
rows.name:
But things happened, and I ended up leaving
BLADE. Now I live my life composing poetry
that no one's interested in buying.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012701_MSG0011
rows.name:
What about you? Would you care
to purchase a copy of my poetry
anthology, "The Celeste Three"?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012701_MSG0012
rows.name:
Each poem is a shimmering nugget of dream-stuff
condensed from the rich inspirations I've found
on Mira! I'm quite sure you'd enjoy it.[ST:wait ]
